necessityProof.blockerResolved: The archive verification renderer subset still had two tail shapes outside the shared report builder: runtime execution pass evidence entries and fake transport packet file/snippet lines.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 can now review archive verification renderers as builder-backed specs, with only local special-line helpers remaining where the evidence shape is genuinely distinct.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 report builder covers title/meta/sections/messages/list ordering. Runtime pass archive references remain renderEntries lines, and fake transport files/snippets remain local line formatters because neither shape is the generic archive file reference contract.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops after these two tail renderers. A local scan found no remaining *ArchiveVerificationRenderer.ts file without verificationReportBuilder usage.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 2 tail archive verification test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real archive profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

archiveVerificationRendererSubsetScan.command: Get-ChildItem src/services -Filter '*ArchiveVerificationRenderer.ts' and report files without verificationReportBuilder usage

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2097-renderer-consolidation-batch-9-v2126.md
